zh.lifeSummary: Rosia Wake是Sir Ralph Wake的女兒，於大約1268年出生在英國貝德福爾可普爾。她和William Mordaunt至少有4個兒子。她去世於1351年在英國貝德福爾圖維享年84歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Rosia Wake是Sir Ralph Wake的女儿，于大约1268年出生在英国貝德福爾可普爾。她和William Mordaunt至少有4个儿子。她去世于1351年在英国貝德福爾圖維享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name for ‘(man of) the watch’, from Middle English wak, wake ‘wake, vigil, watch, period of guard duty’ (Old English wacu, Old Norse vaka). It alternates with the synonymous Middle English wache (Old English wacce), hence the variant Watch. The surname was also interchangeable with Waite (the equivalent Old French term) which, like Wake, was sometimes translated as Latin vigil ‘(one who is) watchful, alert’. Compare the synonymous Vail . When the bearers had high social status, the surname probably denoted an officer with responsibility for the security of a castle, town, or royal person. Compare Wakeman .

variants.name: Vail
meanings: English: occupational name from Old French de la veille ‘of the watch, watchman’, with loss of de; compare Wake . There has been some confusion with the topographic name Vale and the nickname Veal .
Scottish: shortened and altered form of McPhail , Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Phàil ‘son of Paul’.

variants.name: Waite
meanings: English (of Norman origin): occupational name for a watchman, either in a town or castle, from Anglo-Norman French waite ‘watchman, member of the watch’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Wachter ). In the Middle Ages the town waits typically combined the functions of watchmen and musicians through being trumpeters or pipers. There may also have been some late confusion with White or Wheat .

nameMeanings.name: Rosia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Rose   and   Rosemary .  It was first used as an independent baptismal name in the 19th century.

variants.name: Rosemary
meanings: 19th-century coinage, from the name of the herb (which is from Latin ros marinus ‘sea dew’). It is often also assumed to be a combination of the names Rose and Mary .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Rosia Wake was born about 1268, in Cople, Bedfordshire, England as the daughter of Sir Ralph Wake. She had at least 4 sons with William Mordaunt. She died in 1351, in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Rosia Wake est née environ 1268, à Cople, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, fille de Sir Ralph Wake. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec William Mordaunt. Elle est décédée en 1351, à Turvey, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rosia Wake wurde um 1268 in Cople, Bedfordshire, England, als Tochter von Sir Ralph Wake geboren. Sie hatte mit William Mordaunt mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1351 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Turvey, Bedfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Rosia Wake è nata il circa 1268 nel Cople, Bedfordshire, England come figlia di Sir Ralph Wake. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con William Mordaunt. Morì nel 1351, nel Turvey, Bedfordshire, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.Of Turvey,Bed,Eng: イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトゥルビー
ja.lifeSummary: Rosia Wakeは約1268年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアコプルでSir Ralph Wakeの娘として生まれた。彼女はWilliam Mordauntとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1351年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアトゥルビーで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rosia Wake(은)는 대략 1268년 영국 베드퍼드실르 코플에서 Sir Ralph Wake의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 William Mordaunt(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1351년 영국 베드퍼드실르 터르비에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Of Turvey,Bed,Eng: Turvey, Beadafordscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Rosia Wake nasceu aproximadamente 1268, em Cople, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra filha de Sir Ralph Wake. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com William Mordaunt. Ela faleceu em 1351, em Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Rosia Wake родилась около 1268 г. в местности копл, бедфордшир, Англия. Её отца звали Sir Ralph Wake. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от William Mordaunt. Она умерла в 1351 г. в местности турви, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Rosia Wake nació aproximadamente 1268, en Cople, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra como hija de Sir Ralph Wake. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con William Mordaunt. Murió en 1351, en Turvey, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
